name: PostgreSQL migrations + sqlc setup
description: Create the PostgreSQL schema migrations for devices, routes, and segments tables. Set up sqlc configuration and generate type-safe Go code from SQL queries. Include PostGIS extension for spatial data.
acceptance_criteria: sql/migrations/ contains numbered migration files for the core schema
Devices table: dongle_id (PK), serial, public_key, created_at, updated_at
Routes table: dongle_id, route_name (timestamp-based), start_time, end_time, geometry (PostGIS)
Segments table: route reference, segment_number, file manifest (rlog, qlog, cameras), upload status
sqlc.yaml configured to generate Go code from sql/queries/
sql/queries/ contains at least device and route query files
go generate or sqlc generate produces code in internal/db/ without errors
